body.p: This document verifies all four reconciler bug fixes.
This content was successfully inserted into an initially empty document.
The table below contains bold and italic text in its cells:
Above the table — no phantom paragraph should appear between this and the table.
Below the table — no spurious empty paragraph above this.
The text below has mixed bold and italic formatting across multiple runs:
Bold section normal middle italic section
All four reconciler bugs are fixed and verified against the live API.
body.li: B1: insertText at index 1 (empty doc with sectionbreak)
B3a: recursive cell reconciliation via generate_requests
B4: no phantom paragraph from insertTable in inner gap
B2: interior style changes across multiple base runs
